title: Inventory Tooltip Comparison Board
description: Create a comparison board for gear, items, or cards that makes stats, rarity, set bonuses, and upgrade choices scannable.

en.title: Inventory Tooltip Comparison Board
en.description: Create a comparison board for gear, items, or cards that makes stats, rarity, set bonuses, and upgrade choices scannable.

zh-CN.title: 库存与 Tooltip 对比板
zh-CN.description: 围绕装备、卡牌或物品做 tooltip 对比板，让玩家能一眼看出属性差异、套装效果和升级取舍。
